title: Fix docker-compose.yml privacy leak and env shadowing
description: docker-compose.yml: (1) hardcodes personal IP `http://192.168.178.63:8123` as default HASS_HOST (C14, privacy leak); (2) mounts .env via env_file AND sets HASS_HOST/HASS_TOKEN via environment block — env block wins, .env is pointless (M8). Fix: remove hardcoded IP, remove env_file or environment block (pick one).
validation: Read docker-compose.yml, confirm no hardcoded personal IP, env config is consistent.
